vocab.meaning: tình trạng giao thông tắc nghẽn hoàn toàn
vocab.example: When I'm stuck in a total gridlock, I try to remain calm instead of getting frustrated by the lack of movement.

vocab.meaning: nghe bù các chương trình podcast
vocab.example: I usually catch up on my favorite educational podcasts to make the most of the idle time during a jam.

vocab.meaning: giữ thái độ bình tĩnh, điềm tĩnh
vocab.example: It's essential to maintain a sense of composure to avoid road rage when the traffic is crawling at a snail's pace.
I often use the quiet moments in a stationary car to contemplate my schedule for the upcoming week.

vocab.meaning: những sự chậm trễ không lường trước được
vocab.example: I always keep an audiobook ready in case of unforeseen delays on the motorway.
